properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v3 v3 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Night and day I seek Your face Long for You in the secret place All I want in this life Is to truly know You more

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: As the waters cover the sea So Your love covers me Guiding me on roads unknown I trust in You alone

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My saving grace, my endless love Deeper and deeper, I'm falling in love with You My one desire my only truth Deeper and deeper I'm falling in love with You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: My saving grace, my endless love Deeper and deeper, I'm falling in love with You My one desire my only truth Deeper and deeper I'm falling in love with You With You fallin' in love with You ohh

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And I will rise on wings of eagles Soaring high above all my fears I rest in Your open arms of love

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: As the waters cover the sea So Your love covers me, covers me
